commit.message:
Fix benchmarks (#2)

Remove the `-Filter` parameter and just pass a literal `*` as otherwise PowerShell keeps trying to expand it, breaking the invocation.

Update to .NET 9 preview 7

Update to preview 7 of .NET 9.

Consume .NET nightly builds

Consume the latest nightly builds of .NET 9.
